filters: there exists a row where either (from REFERRAL_HIST, where New Rfl Status C = 5) or (from REFERRAL_BED_DAY, where Bed Day Status C = 2)

cohorts.cohort: v cchp umauthorizationrequest fact with referral
filters: there exists a row where from V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequestStatusHistory_Fact, where Um Status C = 5

cohorts.cohort: v cchp umauthorization fact with v cchp umauthorizationhistory fact
filters: Um Status = 'Denied' or Um Status = 'Pending Review' and Um Pending Rsn = 'HP Request for Information'

((RFL_HX_ITEM_CHANGE(RFLHIC).ITEM_CHANGE = 18007 AND NOT RFL_HX_NEW_VAL(RFLHNV).NEW_VAL IS NULL) OR (RFL_HX_ITEM_CHANGE(RFLHIC).ITEM_CHANGE = 18003 AND RFL_HX_NEW_VAL(RFLHNV).NEW_VAL = 1640000010 ) OR (RFL_HX_ITEM_CHANGE(RFLHIC).ITEM_CHANGE = 50 AND RFL_HX_NEW_VAL(RFLHNV).NEW_VAL = '5' ) OR (RFL_HX_ITEM_CHANGE(RFLHIC).ITEM_CHANGE = 2081 AND RFL_HX_NEW_VAL(RFLHNV).NEW_VAL = '2' ) OR (RFL_HX_ITEM_CHANGE(RFLHIC).ITEM_CHANGE = 2080 AND NOT RFL_HX_NEW_VAL(RFLHNV).NEW_VAL IS NULL))
